description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden crate with reinforced edges and visible metal fasteners at the corners. The wood panels are vertically aligned and show a natural grain pattern, giving the box a sturdy and rustic appearance. The word 'FRAGILE' is prominently stenciled in red on at least two sides and the top, indicating that the contents require careful handling. The crate has a flat, removable lid that fits snugly on top, with no visible hinges or handles. There are no visible openings, locks, or additional features aside from the labeling and construction details. The overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage or transport of delicate items in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, wooden crate with metal-reinforced corners and 'FRAGILE' stenciled in red on multiple sides. The box has a flat, removable lid and a rustic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FRAGILE' label stenciled diagonally in red and the wood grain panels with metal corner fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view without any labeling, displaying plain wooden panels and reinforced corners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to the front, also featuring the 'FRAGILE' label and wood grain details.
description_view_3: Plain side view with no visible labeling, showing only the wood panels and metal fasteners.
